game_info.title: v1
game_info.concept: **MAGICUS**: Players engage in turn-based battles by matching 3 or more colored elemental runes on a grid, where each match deals damage to enemies and charges elemental magic meters. Matching specific colors triggers various effects, such as healing or status buffs, while accumulating enough of a single color allows players to tap an on-screen icon to unleash powerful magic spells. Progression involves clearing stages, which unlock new areas and grant rewards like gold and equipment, with difficulty scaling as enemies gain higher health, attack, and introduce new abilities. Players enhance their character by equipping weapons and armor with unique stats, changing jobs, allocating "gift" points to passive abilities, and dragging skill pieces onto a board to activate combined effects. Gold earned from battles can be used to purchase a home and furniture for various benefits, or to summon familiars to aid in combat, with defeat occurring if the player's HP reaches zero.
game_info.description: MAGICUS is a strategic Match-3 RPG where you battle elemental monsters to progress through stages. Match 3 or more runes of the same element to cast spells: Red (Fire) deals damage, Blue (Water) heals, Green (Earth) grants shields, Yellow (Light) charges mana, and Purple (Dark) applies debuffs. As you defeat enemies, you gain gold and experience. Clear all stages to win, but beware—if your Health points drop to zero, the game is over.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the cursor on the grid.
Z: Select a rune to swap / Confirm swap.
Space: Cast Ultimate Spell (when Mana is full).
Shift: View Rune info (hold).
ESC: Pause the game.
ENTER: Start the game.
R: Restart the game (from Game Over screens).

TEST_1.test_description: Verify game initialization and basic move mechanics. The test ensures the game starts, the grid populates, and a valid move can be identified and executed.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game. Scan the grid for a valid horizontal or vertical match. Execute the move by navigating the cursor and swapping tiles. Verify that the match clears and score increases.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game enters PLAYING phase. A move is successfully made. The grid state changes (tiles fall/respawn). No errors occur during execution.

TEST_1.expected: Game enters PLAYING phase. A move is successfully made. The grid state changes (tiles fall/respawn). No errors occur during execution.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify "Win" condition by defeating enemies quickly. This test checks the progression system and Game Over (Win) screen.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Set control mode to TEST_2, which drastically reduces enemy health. Rapidly find and execute matches to deal damage. Progress through all stages to reach the win state.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All enemies are defeated. The game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN phase. The final score is displayed.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify "Lose" condition mechanics. This test ensures the player can take damage and die correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Set control mode to TEST_3 (simulated). Do not make matches (or make poor moves) while the enemy attacks repeatedly until player HP is depleted.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player HP reaches 0. The game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE phase.
TEST_3.description: Verify "Lose" condition mechanics. This test ensures the player can take damage and die correctly.
